description: Input schema for NextDecade Procedure documents. Pass a dict matching this shape to render_docx.render_procedure().

purpose_text.description: First-paragraph PURPOSE statement. Should reference the procedure name and the governing Standard. End with a sentence about mandatory compliance.

scope_text.description: SCOPE statement. Identify which facilities/sites and which Workforce members are covered. Use the canonical 'Workforce' definition.

governance_text.description: INTEGRATED GOVERNANCE FRAMEWORK statement. Reference related Standards / Procedures by name.

exception_text.description: EXCEPTION REQUEST AND COMPLIANCE AUDITS statement. Identify the approver and time-bound limits.

continuous_text.description: CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENT AND REVIEW statement. Annual review cadence; lessons-learned incorporation.

item_shape.term: string — the defined term, smart-quoted if multi-word

item_shape.title: string — full title of the referenced document

content_sections.description: The main body sections. Each section becomes one Heading 1 + intro paragraph + bulleted list. Add as many as needed; the template will render each in order.

item_shape.title: string — section heading, ALL CAPS
item_shape.intro: string — opening paragraph for the section

item_shape.number: string — '0' for initial issue, '1', '2'... for subsequent
item_shape.description: string — e.g., 'Issued for Use', 'Updated Section 5 to reflect ...'
